title: HOGOKIDS Beekeeping & Bakery House Building Toy with LED Light - 1084PCS Friends Girls Baking Building Set with Honey Workshop, Pretend Play Birthday for Kid Girls Boys Ages 8-12+ Years
features: FUN AT BEEKEEPER'S HONEY & BAKERY HOUSE - The HOGOKIDS Friends House Building Toy Set features two adjoining houses - one a honey workshop, the other a bakery. Outside, bees buzz happily around their hives, gathering nectar beneath the tree. In the honey house, the upper floor is for boiling golden honey, while the lower floor is for sealing and bottling it with care. Next door, the bakery turns that sweetness into freshly baked bread and cakes, and the second floor offers a warm, inviting space to enjoy them. Build a peaceful world where the air smells of flowers, honey, and warm pastries

EXCLUSIVE LIGHTING DESIGN - As dusk falls, the honey bee house is still quietly at work. When the sun sets, warm yellow lights gently glow from within the girls house, making the whole scene feel even more peaceful and serene. The elegant glow makes it quietly alive through the night. What makes it special is that the light switch is cleverly hidden inside the wall, making the whole friends house building toy look cleaner and more beautiful.the little town feel quietly alive through the night

CREATIVE HONEY-THEMED ACCESSORIES - The beekeeping yard includes honeycombs, red-roofed beehives, bee and 2 animal figures, and a pink cart filled with jars of golden honey. Inside the honey workshop, you’ll find a boiling pot, bottling station, and various working tools. The bakery features an oven, counter, and a variety of delicious cakes and breads. In the friends girls house building kit, girls and boys can tell their own stories with these customizable elements and accessories for creative pretend play

SAFE, DURABLE & RELIABLE SUPPORT - Made from premium ABS material, the HOGOKIDS Honey Bakery Girls House is built to last with a solid and reliable structure. And its quick-disassembly design makes it easier to explore every interior detail while keeping everything secure. Teens kids can play safely for hours. Designed for boys and girls aged 8-14+, this set includes a colorful, easy-to-follow manual that helps every little builder complete their project with confidence. And if you ever have questions, our friendly support team is always ready to help you out quickly and professionally

A HEARTWARMING GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION - Still looking for the perfect gift for Christmas, birthdays, or any special occasion? The HOGOKIDS Friends Girls Bee House Building Toy Set is a delightful choice that combines creativity, learning, and family fun. From beekeeping to honey-making and then baking delicious treats, it offers a full storytelling experience that inspires imagination and brings people together. Kids, friends, or loved ones will be truly surprised and touched when they unwrap this thoughtful, heartwarming present
DIMENSIONS - 1,084-piece HOGOKIDS toy set measuring over 9.6 in. (24.3 cm) high, 10.4 in. (26.4 cm) wide and 6.6 in. (16.8cm) deep
description: Product Description Creative pretend play Sweet Moments Begin Here Here, a beekeeper’s honey workshop stands beside a cozy bakery, each filled with warmth, stories, and delightful details to discover. Watch as bees gather nectar outside, honey boils in pots, and the smell of freshly baked bread fills the air. Every corner invites you to slow down and enjoy. Beekeeper’s Honey Workshop And Bakery Honey Bake Beekeeping Themed Accessories The honey bee house building toy features a beekeeping area, a honey workshop and a bakery. Each section includes realistic accessories - from hives and honey jars to oven and pastries - encouraging kids to create stories and explore the joy of every step, from hive to honey to handmade treats. Cute Details Warm Light Brighten The Night Daytime Scene During the day, the girls bee house is full of life — bees buzz around, the bakery smells sweet, and every corner tells a story of warmth and creativity. Nighttime Scene When the sun sets, the friends house glows with soft warm-yellow light, creating a peaceful and cozy atmosphere. The light switch is cleverly hidden inside the wall, making the design cleaner and more beautiful. A Shared Experience Full of Creativity Previous page Next page Gather friends or family to build the HOGOKIDS Friends honey bee acres house building set together！With its quick-release structure, kids can easily explore the intricate interiors. During the building process, boys and girls can learn fascinating bee facts and deepen bonds with those they love. Looking for a creative and meaningful gift? This HOGOKIDS Friends Girls House makes an ideal present for boys and girls aged 8–12. With its fun building process and charming details, it can bring hours of joyful play - a delightful surprise for birthday, christmas, holiday, or special occasions.
